PLATE V

bnolndgrinnte-iganiensope mun
Imnprigemtefmenairg)

beller

h ennt

lran

nr

N

1E

done

0

ue

E7

A OAN - -

2055 AAA a

HENNEBELLE il HENBANE il HYOSCYAMUS RETICULATUS

A Mediterranean species foreign to England.
From an Anglo-Saxon Herbal of about IO50 (Cott. Vit, C. ill).

Sec page 187.
